zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Marion de Lennox MacGregor於1230年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋時，她的父親Gilchrist de Levenax, 1st Baron of Arrochar44歲，母親Marjory de Lennox78歲。她於1266年與Lord Gregor MacGregor 10th Lord Lag, MacGregor在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年在她的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋度福利斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lennox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from the districtnear Dumbarton, recorded in 1174 in the form Leuenaichs and inthe following year as Levenax. Apparently it is named fromGaelic leamhan ‘elm’ + the locative suffix -ach +English -s.

variants.name: Lenox
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Lennox  .

nameMeanings.name: MacGregor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McGregor
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Griogair or Mac Greagair ‘son of Griogar’, Gaelic form of the personal name Gregory . Compare Grierson .

History: The Scottish Highland clan McGregor claims descent from the king of Picts and Scots Kenneth MacAlpin (Cináed mac Ailpín; 810–858  AD ). The origins of the clan are unclear. In the 13th century it was established on lands on the shores of Loch Awe and already in conflict with its neighbors of Clan Campbell. By the 16th century the McGregors had retreated deep into Glen Strae and acquired the nickname ‘Children of the Mist’. In 1603 the clan was abolished by royal edict and many members of the clan changed their surname. A year later, the chief of Clan McGregor and eleven of his followers were hanged in Edinburgh. Despite the proscription, the clan survived and supported the king in the Scottish Civil War (1644–51). The exploits of the Jacobite leader Rob Roy McGregor (1671–1734) were romanticized in a novel by Sir Walter Scott. The proscription was eventually repealed in 1774.

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Marion de Lennox MacGregor was born in 1230, in Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Gilchrist de Levenax, 1st Baron of Arrochar, was 44 and her mother, Marjory de Lennox, was 78. She married Lord Gregor MacGregor 10th Lord Lag, MacGregor in 1266, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1300, in her hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Dumfries, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Lord Gregor MacGregor 10th Lord Lag, MacGregor en 1266, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1300, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Dumfries, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Lag Castle Cemetery, Dumfries, , Dumfrie: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 드프리스
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Marion de Lennox MacGregor(이)가 1230년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilchrist de Levenax, 1st Baron of Arrochar(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjory de Lennox(은)는 78세였다. 그녀는 1266년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Lord Gregor MacGregor 10th Lord Lag, MacGregor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 드프리스에 묻혔다.

ru.Lag Castle Cemetery, Dumfries, , Dumfrie: думфриесь, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Marion de Lennox MacGregor родилась в 1230 г. в местности думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gilchrist de Levenax, 1st Baron of Arrochar было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Marjory de Lennox, 78. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Gregor MacGregor 10th Lord Lag, MacGregor в 1266 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1300 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности думфриесь, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания.
